## Skill Information
- **Proposed Name:** `skill-name-kebab-case`
- **Category:** (e.g., frontend, backend, dev-tools, architecture, code-quality, etc.)
- **Tags:** `[tag1, tag2, tag3]`

<!-- Briefly explain why an AI agent or human developer needs a strict guideline for this specific task. -->

<!-- Provide 2-3 clear conditions for when this skill should be activated. -->

## Pre-Submission Checklist
- [ ] I have checked the `registry.json` and existing issues to ensure this skill doesn't already exist.
- [ ] This skill is technology-agnostic where possible, or clearly scopes its technology in the tags.
- [ ] I have read the `CONTRIBUTING.md` guidelines.
- [ ] I am willing to submit a PR with the full `SKILL.md` if this proposal is approved.
